options: When the goal is to streamline customer support processes and improve response times
When the main objective is to enhance data security and compliance measures
When the focus is on optimizing marketing campaigns and strategies
explanation: Einstein Agentforce es más ventajoso cuando el objetivo es agilizar los procesos de soporte al cliente y mejorar los tiempos de respuesta, no para seguridad de datos ni optimización de marketing. Su valor principal está en la automatización inteligente de interacciones de servicio al cliente.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities.
How should the AI Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Select the latest Opportunities related list as a merge field.
explanation: Para obtener datos de las tres oportunidades más recientes de una cuenta en un prompt template, crear un flow es la técnica correcta, ya que permite recuperar registros relacionados con lógica de ordenamiento y límites. Los merge fields estándar no permiten este nivel de control sobre registros relacionados.

question:
A data scientist needs to view and manage models in Einstein Studio. The data scientist also needs to create prompt templates in Prompt Builder.
Which permission sets should an AI Specialist assign to the data scientist?
options: Data Cloud Admin and Prompt Template Manager
Prompt Template Manager and Prompt Template User
Prompt Template User and Data Cloud Admin
explanation: Para que el agente pueda ejecutar el flujo del nuevo proceso de reemplazo de producto, el permission set group del usuario del agente debe incluir acceso al flujo de Product Replacement. Sin este acceso, la acción del agente no puede invocar el flujo correctamente.

question:
An AI Specialist configured Data Masking within the Einstein Trust Layer.
How should the AI Specialist begin validating that the correct fields are being masked?
options: Use a Flow-based resource in Prompt Builder to debug the fields’ merge values using Flow Debugger.
Request the Einstein Generative AI Audit Data from the Security section of the Setup menu.
Enable the collection and storage of Einstein Generative AI Audit Data on the Einstein Feedback setup page.
explanation: Agentforce Data Library es más útil cuando el agente necesita responder basándose en un conjunto curado de documentos de políticas que se almacenan, actualizan regularmente e indexan. Es la solución ideal para bases de conocimiento internas que requieren búsqueda semántica y grounding confiable.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative Al capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information.
What is a possible explanation for the poor prompt performance?
options: The data being used for grounding Is incorrect or incomplete.
The prompt template version is incompatible with the chosen LLM.
The Einstein Trust Layer is incorrectly configured.
explanation: Tanto change sets como Salesforce CLI/Metadata API pueden utilizarse para desplegar flows, Apex y todos los metadatos relacionados con el agente de forma completa y consistente. No es necesario recrear manualmente los componentes del agente en producción ni limitarse a un solo método de despliegue.

question: What is best practice when refining Einstein Agentforce or copilot  custom action instructions?
options: Provide examples of user messages that are expected to trigger the action.
Use consistent introductory phrases and verbs across multiple action instructions.
Specify the persona who will request the action.
explanation: Data Library automatiza la ingestión, indexación de datos y crea un retriever predeterminado para usarlo en prompts y agentes para grounding con información relevante. No hace OCR automático para PDFs en general ni realiza clasificación taxonómica; su función principal es facilitar el grounding.

question:
Universal Containers' service team wants to customize the standard case summary response from Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
What should the AI Specialist do to achieve this?
options: Customize the standard Record Summary template for the Case object,
Summarize the Case with a standard Agentforce or copilot  action.
Create a custom Record Summary prompt template for the Case object.
explanation: Para asignar acciones a un agente, primero se debe asignar la acción a un Topic en la página de detalles de Agent Actions. Action Builder no es el lugar correcto y asignar directamente en Agent Builder omite el paso requerido de asociación con Topics.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to assess Salesforce's generative AI features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third-party large language models (LLMs). Specifically, UC wants the following capabilities to be part of Einstein's generative AI service.
- No data is used for LLM training or product improvements by third party LLMs.
- No data is retained outside of UC's Salesforce org.
- The data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider.
Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the AI Specialist highlight to UC that addresses these requirements?
options: Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
Prompt Defense
explanation: Einstein Sales Assistant es la solución de Salesforce para outreach a escala con mensajes personalizados y contextualizados para leads y clientes. Prompt Builder requiere configuración manual y Einstein Lead follow-up no es una función específica del catálogo estándar de Salesforce.

question:
Universal Containers wants to be able to detect with a high level of confidence if content generated by a large language model (LLM) contains toxic language.
Which action should an Al Specialist take in the Trust Layer to confirm toxicity is being appropriately managed?
options: Access the Toxicity Detection log in Setup and export all entries where isToxicityDetected is true.
Create a flow that sends an email to a specified address each time the toxicity score from the response exceeds a predefined threshold.
Create a Trust Layer audit report within Data Cloud that uses a toxicity detector type filter to display toxic responses and their respective scores.
explanation: Para habilitar el grounding de Record Snapshots en un prompt template, se debe crear un field set en el objeto que define qué campos se incluirán en la instantánea. El page layout y los Dynamic Forms son configuraciones de UI separadas que no controlan qué campos se capturan para grounding.

question:
When configuring a prompt template, an AI Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response.
Which information does the Resolution text provide?
options: It shows the full text that is sent to the Trust Layer.
It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows which sensitive data is masked before it is sent to the LLM.
explanation: Para resolver un campo requerido faltante al configurar el retriever, se debe actualizar el search index para incluir el campo deseado. El retriever depende del search index para saber qué campos están disponibles; sin actualizar el índice, el campo simplemente no estará accesible.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to use Al to suggest recommended products from its catalog.
Which type of prompt template should UC use?
options: Record summary prompt template
Email generation prompt template
Flex prompt template
explanation: Cuando las respuestas del agente con PDFs no son satisfactorias, se debe analizar el mapeo entre campos fuente y campos del objeto de Data Cloud. Un mapeo incorrecto significa que el contenido de los PDFs no se indexa correctamente, generando respuestas imprecisas o incompletas.

question: What is the primary function of the planner service in the Einstein Agentforce or copilot  system?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Offering real-time language translation during conversations
Identifying Agentforce or copilot  actions to respond to user utterances
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer actúa como intermediario seguro entre Salesforce y el LLM, enmascarando datos sensibles antes de enviar el prompt y desenmascando los datos en la respuesta. Esta arquitectura garantiza que información confidencial nunca sea enviada directamente al modelo externo.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team with automatic post-call visibility into mention of competitors, products, and other custom phrases.
Which feature should the AI Specialist set up to enable UC's sales team?
options: Call Summaries
Call Explorer
Call Insights
explanation: Para conectar modelos LLM alojados externamente en plataformas como AWS a Salesforce, se utiliza Model Builder, la herramienta diseñada específicamente para registrar y gestionar modelos externos. App Builder y Agentforce Builder tienen otros propósitos y no pueden conectar modelos LLM externos.

question:
A sales rep at Universal Containers is extremely busy and sometimes will have very long sales calls on voice and video calls and might miss key details. They are just starting to adopt new generative AI features.
Which Einstein Generative AI feature should an AI Specialist recommend to help the rep get the details they might have missed during a conversation?
options: Call Summary
Call Explorer
Sales Summary
explanation: Para configurar las reglas de enmascaramiento de datos que no cumplen con las políticas de privacidad, se debe ir al setup del Einstein Trust Layer y configurar las reglas de data masking. Las otras opciones no son los puntos de configuración correctos para gestionar el enmascaramiento de datos de IA.

question:
Universal Containers wants to allow its service agents to query the current fulfillment status of an order with natural language. There is an existing autolaunched flow to query the information from Oracle ERP, which is the system of record for the order fulfillment process. 
How should an AI Specialist apply the power of conversational AI to this use case?
options: Create a Flex prompt template in Prompt Builder.
Configure the Integration Flow Standard Action in Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
explanation: Al habilitar el enriquecimiento de event logs con datos de conversación, el especialista puede ver datos de sesión incluyendo inputs del usuario y respuestas del agente de los últimos 7 días. Esta configuración tiene un límite de 7 días y no permite ver el click path ni generar informes históricos sin límite de tiempo.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to offer personalized service experiences and reduce agent handling time with Al-generated email responses, grounded in Knowledge base.
Which Al capability should UC use?
options: Einstein Email Replies
Einstein Service Replies for Email
Einstein Generative Service Replies for Email
explanation: Un Flex Template es la solución correcta para crear propuestas de ventas que necesitan datos de múltiples objetos estándar y personalizados no relacionados. Las plantillas estándar no admiten múltiples objetos como inputs, por lo que solo Flex Templates ofrecen la flexibilidad necesaria.

question:
An AI Specialist turned on Einstein Generative AI in Setup. Now, the AI Specialist would like to create custom prompt templates in Prompt Builder. However, they cannot access Prompt Builder in the Setup menu.
What is causing the problem?
options: The Prompt Template User permission set was not assigned correctly.
The Prompt Template Manager permission set was not assigned correctly.
The large language model (LLM) was not configured correctly in Data Cloud.
explanation: Einstein Trust Layer proporciona datos de auditoría que incluyen datos enmascarados y puntuación de toxicidad para revisar el procesamiento de IA. No proporciona métricas de precisión de respuesta, puntuaciones de alucinación ni puntuaciones de sesgo que requieren otros sistemas de evaluación.

question:
Universal Containers is very concerned about security compliance and wants to understand:
- Which prompt text is sent to the large language model (LLM)
- How it is masked
- The masked response
What should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Ingest the Einstein Shield Event logs into CRM Analytics.
Review the debug logs of the running user.
Enable audit trail in the Einstein Trust Layer.
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de prompt template correcto para poblar campos de formularios dinámicos con contenido generado por LLM, permitiendo revisión humana antes de guardar. Las otras opciones tienen propósitos diferentes: Sales Email para correos electrónicos y Record Summary para resúmenes generales.

question:
Universal Containers is evaluating Einstein Generative AI features to improve the productivity of the service center operation.
Which features should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Service Replies and Case Summaries
Service Replies and Work Summaries
Reply Recommendations and Sales Summaries
explanation: Service Replies y Work Summaries son las dos funciones de Einstein Generative AI más relevantes para mejorar la productividad del centro de servicio. Service Replies genera respuestas sugeridas para agentes y Work Summaries resume el trabajo realizado, optimizando el tiempo de los agentes de soporte.

question:
Amid their busy schedules, sales reps at Universal Containers dedicate time to follow up with prospects and existing clients via email regarding renewals or new deals. They spend many hours throughout the week reviewing past communications and details about their customers before performing their outreach.
Which standard Agentforce or copilot  action helps sales reps draft personalized emails to prospects by generating text based on previous successful communications?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Find Similar Opportunities
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Draft or Revise Sales Email
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Summarize Record
explanation: Einstein Agentforce Action: Draft or Revise Sales Email es la acción estándar diseñada para ayudar a los reps a redactar emails personalizados basándose en comunicaciones anteriores exitosas. Find Similar Opportunities busca deals similares y Summarize Record genera resúmenes, no emails personalizados.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) plans to send one of three different emails to its customers based on the customer's lifetime value score and their market segment.
Considering that UC are required to explain why an e-mail was selected, which AI model should UC use to achieve this?
options: Predictive model and generative model
Generative model
Predictive model
explanation: Un modelo predictivo es el adecuado para seleccionar uno de tres emails basándose en el lifetime value y segmento de mercado, y puede explicar la razón de la selección mediante sus features de predicción. Un modelo generativo crea contenido nuevo pero no puede explicar fácilmente por qué seleccionó una opción entre varias predefinidas.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has recently received an increased number of support cases. As a result, UC has hired more customer support reps and has started to assign some of the ongoing cases to newer reps. 
Which generative AI solution should the new support reps use to understand the details of a case without reading through each case comment?
options: Einstein Agentforce or copilot
Einstein Sales Summaries
Einstein Work Summaries
explanation: Einstein Work Summaries permite a los nuevos reps de soporte entender rápidamente los detalles de un caso sin leer todos los comentarios, resumiendo automáticamente el historial del caso. Einstein Sales Summaries es para ventas y Einstein Agentforce es una plataforma más amplia, no específicamente para resumir casos.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to improve the efficiency of addressing customer questions and reduce agent handling time with AI generated responses. The agents should be able to leverage their existing knowledge base and identify whether the responses are coming from the large language model (LLM) or from Salesforce Knowledge.
Which step should UC take to meet this requirement?
options: Turn on Service AI Grounding, Grounding with Case, and Service Replies.
Turn on Service Replies, Service AI Grounding, and Grounding with Knowledge.
Turn on Service AI Grounding and Grounding with Knowledge.
explanation: Para habilitar respuestas de IA basadas en Knowledge con visibilidad sobre el origen (LLM vs Knowledge), se debe activar Service Replies, Service AI Grounding y Grounding with Knowledge juntos. Grounding with Case no es el mecanismo para identificar respuestas de Knowledge, y solo Service AI Grounding no activa las respuestas sugeridas.

question:
The AI Specialist of Northern Trail Outfitters reviewed the organization's data masking settings within the Configure Data Masking menu within Setup. Upon assessing all of the fields, a few additional fields were deemed sensitive and have been masked within Einstein's Trust Layer.
Which steps should the AI Specialist take upon modifying the masked fields?
options: Turn off the Einstein Trust Layer and turn it on again.
Test and confirm that the responses generated from prompts that utilize the data and masked data do not adversely affect the quality of the generated response
Turn on Einstein Feedback so that end users can report if there are any negative side effects on AI features.
explanation: Después de modificar los campos enmascarados, se deben probar los prompts que utilizan esos datos para confirmar que el enmascaramiento no afecta negativamente la calidad de las respuestas generadas. Reiniciar el Trust Layer no tiene efecto y habilitar Einstein Feedback no valida directamente el impacto del enmascaramiento.

question:
Before activating a custom Agentforce or copilot  action, an AI Specialist would like to understand multiple real-world user utterances to ensure the action is being selected appropriately.
Which tool should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Model Playground
Einstein Agentforce or copilot
Agentforce or copilot  Builder
explanation: Agentforce Builder es la herramienta correcta para entender múltiples utterances reales del usuario y verificar que las acciones personalizadas se seleccionan apropiadamente. Model Playground es para probar el modelo en general y Einstein Agentforce es la plataforma completa, no una herramienta de testing específica.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) noticed an increase in customer contract cancellations in the last few months. UC is seeking ways to address this issue by implementing a proactive outreach program to customers before they cancel their contracts and is asking the Salesforce team to provide suggestions.
Which use case functionality of Model Builder aligns with UC's request?
options: Product recommendation prediction
Customer churn prediction
Contract Renewal Date prediction
explanation: Customer churn prediction es la funcionalidad de Model Builder que se alinea con la necesidad de predecir qué clientes están en riesgo de cancelar contratos para un programa de outreach proactivo. Product recommendation y Contract Renewal Date prediction tienen propósitos diferentes al de retención de clientes.

question:
Universal Containers wants to utilize Einstein for Sales to help sales reps reach their sales quotas by providing Al-generated plans containing guidance and steps for closing deals.
Which feature should the Al Specialist recommend to the sales team?
options: Create Close Plan
Find Similar Deals
Create Account Plan
explanation: Create Close Plan es la función de Einstein for Sales que genera planes con orientación y pasos específicos para ayudar a los reps a cerrar sus oportunidades y alcanzar cuotas. Find Similar Deals busca deals parecidos y Create Account Plan es para estrategias de cuenta, no para cierre de oportunidades específicas.

question:
An AI Specialist is considering using a Fleld Generation prompt template type.
What should the AI Specialist check before creating the Field Generation prompt to ensure it is possible for the field to be enabled for generative AI?
options: That the field chosen must be a rich text field with 255 characters or more
That the org is set to API version 59 or higher
That the Lightning page layout where the field will reside has been upgraded to Dynamic Forms
explanation: Antes de crear un Field Generation prompt, la página Lightning donde residirá el campo debe estar actualizada a Dynamic Forms, que es el requisito previo para habilitar generación de campo con IA. El campo no necesita ser de texto enriquecido ni se requiere una versión específica de API para este propósito.

question: Which feature in the Einstein Trust Layer helps to minimize the risks of jailbreaking and prompt injection attacks?
options: Secure Data Retrieval and Grounding
Data Masking
Prompt Defense
explanation: Prompt Defense es la característica del Einstein Trust Layer que protege contra ataques de jailbreaking e inyección de prompts, actuando como barrera de seguridad en las interacciones con el LLM. Secure Data Retrieval protege datos en tránsito y Data Masking oculta información sensible, pero ninguno aborda específicamente los ataques de manipulación de prompts.
